text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"Upgrade proposal email templates to branded bilingual HTML","description":"In `hooks/useProposalActions.ts`, replace bare text email templates with branded bilingual HTML matching the style of `api/payment-link.js`. Changes needed: 1. Create a shared helper function `generateProposalEmailHtml()` that takes: clientName, eventDate, headcount, eventType, location, total, depositAmount, portalUrl. Returns branded HTML matching payment-link.js style with: - MTL Craft Cocktails header with brand gradient (#6182FA to #4F6AD6) - Bilingual greeting (EN/FR) - Event summary card (date, headcount, event type, location) - Total amount and deposit info - "View Your Proposal / Voir votre proposition" CTA button linking to external portal - Trust footer with tax numbers (GST: 721488476 RT0001, QST: 1226717648 TQ0001) - Same styling as payment-link email 2. In `handleCreateQuote` (lines 482-498), replace the inline HTML with a call to the shared helper. 3. In `handleSendProposal` (lines 818-827), replace the bare text email with a call to the shared helper. Use HTML email instead of plain text converted with `.replace(/\n/g, '
')`. Important: The helper function must escape user-provided strings (clientName, location, etc.) to prevent XSS. Use a simple inline escape function since `api/utils/html.js` is server-side only. The portal URL will come from the API (share-url endpoint for handleSendProposal, or the quote creation response URL for handleCreateQuote).","assignedBy":"email-template-upgrader","timestamp":"2026-02-22T21:58:19.735Z"}

{"type":"shutdown_request","requestId":"shutdown-1771798597900@email-template-upgrader","from":"team-lead","reason":"All work is complete and verified. Please shut down.","timestamp":"2026-02-22T22:16:37.900Z"}
